title: Fairshare starvation: bio-lab jobs pending 48+ hours
summary: Account bio-lab has 4 jobs pending for 48+ hours due to low fairshare weight. ml-lab has consumed 85% of cluster resources over the past 72 hours, depressing bio-lab's fairshare score to near zero.

notes: Consider setting TopJob priority boost for bio-lab or setting ml-lab job hold.
